steps.title: Print the required labels needed for...
steps.instruction: Print the required labels needed for Bray extraction for each site, depth, and replicate.

steps.title: Weigh out 3 g of soil...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 3 g of soil into labeled 50 mL centrifuge tubes.

steps.title: Add 20 mL of Olsen Extract...
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL of Olsen Extract solution (in cabinet under hood in 1521) using the pipet and electronic pipettor.

steps.title: Cap the samples and shake to mix
steps.instruction: Cap the samples and shake to mix. Add samples to foam block on shaker.

steps.title: Centrifuge samples (using centrifuge on west...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples (using centrifuge on west side of 1521) for 4000 rpm, , 8 minutes .

steps.title: Pour off liquid into a clean...
steps.instruction: Pour off liquid into a clean and labelled 50 mL centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Freeze samples on their side to...
steps.instruction: Freeze samples on their side to prevent tube breaking in the -20 °C freezer (Staging Freezer 2) bottom shelf if unable to filter immediately.

steps.title: Follow sample filtering protocol below when ready to filter extracts
steps.instruction: Follow sample filtering protocol below when ready to filter extracts.
